name: @layerzerolabs/onesig-stellar-contracts
description: Stellar Soroban contracts for LayerZero OneSig protocol

scripts.build:contract: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool stellar contract build --package onesig
scripts.build:contract:native: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --docker-platform native stellar contract build --package onesig
scripts.build:mocks: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo build --release --target wasm32v1-none -p mock_vault -p mock_chain -p mock_factory" stellar
scripts.build:mocks:native: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --docker-platform native --script "cargo build --release --target wasm32v1-none -p mock_vault -p mock_chain -p mock_factory" stellar
scripts.lint: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo fmt -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -p onesig -p mock_vault -p mock_chain -p mock_factory -- -D warnings" stellar
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo clippy --all-targets -p onesig -p mock_vault -p mock_chain -p mock_factory --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged && cargo fmt" stellar
scripts.test:contract: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo nextest run --package onesig" stellar
